description_long: This is a medium-sized, round woven picnic basket with a deep bowl-like body and a single, thick, braided handle arching over the top. The basket is constructed from interlaced strips of reddish-brown wicker, forming a pattern of concentric rings and a slightly flared rim. The weave is moderately open, allowing glimpses of the interior and giving the basket a lightweight, airy appearance. The handle is robust and tightly braided, attached securely to the rim on opposite sides. There is no visible lid or closure mechanism, leaving the interior fully accessible from above. The surface has a natural, matte finish with subtle variations in color and texture typical of hand-woven wicker.
description: A round, reddish-brown woven wicker picnic basket with a thick braided handle and an open top. The basket features a moderately open weave and a natural matte finish.
description_view_0: The basket is seen from a slightly elevated angle, showing the open top, circular rim, and both handle attachments.
description_view_1: The basket is viewed from the side, with the handle appearing as a vertical braid and the weave pattern visible along the rim and body.
description_view_2: The basket is shown from the opposite side of view 0, again highlighting the open top and the handle's arch.
description_view_3: The basket is viewed from the side, similar to view 1, with the handle's braid prominent and the weave pattern along the body visible.
attribute_handle_type: Single, thick, braided, fixed handle made of wicker, arching from rim to rim.
attribute_weave_pattern: Open, concentric ring weave with a moderately loose, hand-woven wicker pattern.
